description: §41 — a `use scrml:ui` declaration placed inside a `${ }` logic block fires E-USE-001. `use` is a file-preamble declaration (markup scope), not a logic-block statement.
rationale: §41: `use` brings names into MARKUP scope and must live in the file preamble, outside any `${ }` logic context (which is a distinct value scope, §41 line 21994). A `use` inside `${ }` is rejected E-USE-001.
